idea-plugin.name: Aurora AI Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Aurora - Your AI-Powered Coding Assistant for IntelliJ IDEA

Aurora brings the power of AI-assisted coding to IntelliJ IDEA. Chat with your AI assistant, get code suggestions, ask questions about your codebase, and more — all from a sleek tool window.

Features:

  • Chat Interface — Natural language conversations with AI coding assistance
  • Multi-Provider Support — OpenAI, Anthropic, and any OpenAI-compatible API
  • Configurable Models — Choose your model, adjust temperature and token limits
  • Clean UI — Dark-themed chat panel with message history

Built as an IntelliJ IDEA plugin inspired by Roo Code / Zoo Code for VS Code.

action.description: Open the Aurora AI Assistant tool window
